MODULE: cosmos.tools.security.header_analyzer
FILE: cosmos/tools/security/header_analyzer.py (585 lines)
CATEGORY: tools

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Email Header Analyzer

"Good news, everyone! I can trace emails back through the tubes of the internet!"

Comprehensive email header analysis for security investigation.

CLASSES:
- AuthenticationResult(Enum): Email authentication results.
- ThreatLevel(Enum): Threat assessment level.
- HopInfo: Information about a single mail hop.
- AuthenticationStatus: Email authentication status.
- EmailHeaderAnalysis: Complete email header analysis.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- HeaderAnalyzer: Email header analyzer for security investigation.

Analyzes:
- Email routing and
  Methods: def parse_headers(self, raw_headers: str) -> Dict[str, List[str]]
  Methods: def analyze(self, raw_headers: str) -> EmailHeaderAnalysis
  Methods: def generate_report(self, analysis: EmailHeaderAnalysis) -> str
